name: Rollover
short_description: Rollover is a brutally punishing climbing game where every roll could be your last. With unpredictable, difficult physics and a movement system designed to test your limits.
detailed_description:
Rollover – The Ultimate Test of Patience and Precision

Rollover is a brutally punishing climbing game where every roll could be your last. With unpredictable, difficult physics and a movement system designed to test your limits, you'll battle your way upward—one agonizing moment at a time.

Every misstep sends you tumbling down, erasing hours of progress in seconds. The higher you climb, the more the pressure mounts, and the more your sanity unravels. This game isn’t just about reaching the top—it’s about enduring the journey, overcoming frustration, and proving to yourself that you can master the chaos.

Are you ready to roll, or will you lose your sanity before the game does?

Gameplay:

  • Difficult – Prepare for a real challenge!

  • Try to get the fastest time – Only the quickest will conquer!

  • Smash spacebar to utilize movement – The faster you hit, the better you move!

  • Master the controls – Precision is key to success!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
